title: Trading Bot Follow up
author: edgarmoria
selftext:
Hi Guys,

[](https://preview.redd.it/quick-preview-after-my-original-post-v0-5vzgeyk9je7g1.png?width=1488&format=png&auto=webp&s=747690ed28ec5b7a436fcd8fd8534c8e6765f069)

Following my previous post in November (below) here's a quick preview of my bot in action! I was testing it manually with 4 contracts so don't mind the 3 contracts in the strategy :)

https://preview.redd.it/esn2n5name7g1.png?width=1488&format=png&auto=webp&s=c3a8ed016c8bdc7bc306f005d13594cbdc532dcb

"Guys, I've developed a trading bot that does on average 17k a month with a max drawdown of 1.2k. It's perfect for prop firms. I'm thinking of creating a website to sell it on a subscription basis. The bot has zero lookahead and it's solely based on mathematical algorithms and price action. How much would you be willing to pay for it? Would you like a 7 day trial? While I don't need the subscription money I also don't want to release it to the general public and I've spent around 12k and lots of sweat and tears blowing up accounts until I fine tuned. Renting it out is just hypothetical at this time but it would be nice to know if the public would be willing to pay for it. I know there's a lot of bullshit out there selling snake oil so not sure if creating a website and selling it would be worth my time. It would be nice to give something back tho."

I'm currently in the process of making the website. I'm really happy with how the bot is performing lately. If you want me to let you know when the website is live please visit [automatedalgos.com](http://automatedalgos.com/) and drop in your details!

comments.author: Extra-Compote7143
comments.body: I would advice not to do the website with subscription model. I personally developed 4 years trading algorithms + one year trading platform where people can access our algos with subscription model. 4 months after the launch I realized it's really hard to get users. Internet is filled with these trading platforms with subscription model etc and most traders/investors dont want it. Instead I just set up quant shop and that's working out much better. If you have good algo I would recommend setting up fund or quant shop dedicated to funds

replies.author: edgarmoria
replies.body:
I'm not too worried about that. I'll give it a go for half year and if doesn't get traction I'll just shut it down. The bot works for me so having a website selling the bot for a fraction of what it makes is just a way of paying it forward.

But thanks for the heads up. I'll have a look at quantshops!

replies.author: 227birdman
replies.body: Hello is it still possible to get access to your bot ?

replies.author: Medical-Gate-3345
replies.body: What is the latest on your algotrading bot. Your website is not yet live. I would like to backtest it on RH, if available. Please let me know the possibility. Thank you!

comments.author: haul1234
comments.body: Hey would it be possible to test this please?

comments.author: NorrisLogan99
comments.body: Edgar i just sent you a message
